name: football-player-value-v1
description: Resolves binary questions about a football player's value to their club via interpretive synthesis over a tiered evidence dossier (primary on/off splits and team-share metrics, secondary independent scout analysis, tertiary decorative quotes). v2 splits the role into a Sovereign Agent investigator that builds the dossier and an LLM precompile judge that adjudicates against it. v2.1 pins the subject_ref convention for comparative questions and adds confidence calibration bands to judge.md.

subject_ref.description: Dossier key of the player whose comparative claim the verdict resolves in favor of (NOT the player named first in the question). See judge.md for the canonical convention and examples.

citations.description: Dotted dossier paths the judge relied on, each prefixed with 'dossier://'.

rationale_hash.description: keccak256 of the rationale text. The text itself lives in the off-chain audit bundle.
